swn.title: 🚀 Stars Without Number - Quick Start
swn.step1_desc:
Use `/swn` for a random character or `/threshold_wizard` to roll stats.
Import from **[characterswithoutnumber.app](https://characterswithoutnumber.app)** or Sectors Without Number using `/importsheet`.
swn.step2_desc:
• **Skill Checks**: Roll `2d6 + Skill + Attribute`. High is better.
• **Combat**: Roll `1d20 + Attack Bonus + Attribute`. Meet or beat AC.
• **Saves**: Roll `1d20`. Equal or higher than your Save target.
swn.step3_desc:
• `/sheet`: View your stats.
• `/update`: Sync with source URL.
• `/roll 2d6+1`: Generic dice roller.

wwn.title: ⚔️ Worlds Without Number - Quick Start
wwn.step1_desc:
Use `/wwn` for a random character or `/threshold_wizard` for manual stats.
Import sheets from Google or **[characterswithoutnumber.app](https://characterswithoutnumber.app)**.
wwn.step2_desc:
• **Skills**: `2d6 + Skill + Attribute`. Target is usually 6-10.
• **Combat**: `1d20 + AB + Attribute`. Target is Enemy AC.
• **Shock**: Melee weapons often deal damage even on a miss!
wwn.step3_desc:
• `/skill [name]`: Roll a specific skill.
• `/update`: Sync your character stats.
• `/attack [weapon]`: Roll attack and damage logic.

cwn.title: 💾 Cities Without Number - Quick Start
cwn.step1_desc:
Use `/cwn` for a random character or `/threshold_wizard`.
Sync your gear from **[characterswithoutnumber.app](https://characterswithoutnumber.app)** using `/importjson`.
cwn.step2_desc:
• **Checks**: `2d6` for skills, `1d20` for combat. Standard OSR base.
• **Hacking**: Use specialized programs and your cyberdeck.
• **Trauma**: Watch out for specialized damage types!
cwn.step3_desc:
• `/gen npc`: Quick cyberpunk flavor.
• `/update`: Sync stats from online builder.
• `/tracker damage`: Deal damage by name.

intro.footer: Pro-tip: All commands work with !prefix too! Type /help for more.

commands.starthere_desc: Quick start guide for SWN, WWN, or CWN.
commands.swnhelp_desc: Quick start guide for Stars Without Number.
commands.wwnhelp_desc: Quick start guide for Worlds Without Number.
commands.cwnhelp_desc: Quick start guide for Cities Without Number.
commands.lang_invalid: ⚠️ Invalid language! Choose from: EN, FR, ES, DE, PT, SV, RU.

help.title: 🎲 Without Number Bot Help
help.description:
Welcome! This bot helps you roll dice, check equipment, and manage your character sheet.
🌐 **Bot Info:** [dicewithoutnumber.duckdns.org](http://147.182.248.196:8080)
🛠️ **Compatible with:** [characterswithoutnumber.app](https://characterswithoutnumber.app)

**New? Type `/swnhelp`, `/wwnhelp`, or `/cwnhelp` for a quick guide!**
**Change Language:** `/language lang:[EN|FR|ES|DE|PT|SV]`
**All commands work with both `/` (Slash) and `!` (Prefix)!**
help.char_imports_body:
**`/update` | `/sync` | `!update`**
Instantly refresh your active character stats from its stored source URL.

**`/importsheet` | `!importsheet` <url>**
Link your Google Sheet (SWN, WWN, or CWN). It loads stats and enables sync!

**`/importjson` | `!importjson` <url>**
Import from a raw JSON URL (fastest way to sync *characterswithoutnumber.app*).

**`/link` | `!link` <url>**
Connect your character to a persistent URL (JSON or Google Sheet) for easy syncing.

**JSON File Upload**
Simply drag and drop your `.json` export file into the chat. The bot handles it automatically!

**`/sheet` | `!sheet` | `/sc` | `/sf`**
View your character. **`/sc`** for Combat view, **`/sf`** for Full view.
help.char_mgmt_body:
**`/switchchar` | `!switchchar` <name>**
Swap between your imported characters.

**`/portrait` | `!portrait` [url]**
Set an image for any of your characters. Attach a file OR paste a URL. Shows as a thumbnail on `/sheet`!

**`/bind` | `/unbind`**
🎭 Associate a character with the current channel. The bot will remember which hero you are playing in each game!

**`/awardxp` | `!awardxp` <amount>**
Award XP to your active character.

**`/swn`, `/wwn`, `/cwn`**
Instantly generate a random Level 1 character for that system.

**`/threshold` | `/threshold_wizard`**
Roll 3d6 attributes in order, or use the interactive Wizard!

**`/swnhelp` | `/wwnhelp` | `/cwnhelp`**
Quick-start guides for your chosen system (SWN, WWN, or CWN)!
help.rolling_body:
**`/attack` | `!attack` [weapon]**
Rolls a 1d20 attack. Adds modifiers automatically from your sheet!

**`/gmroll` | `!gmroll`**
Hidden roll (private/ephemeral) so only you see the result.

**`/skill` | `!skill` [skill_name]**
Rolls a 2d6 skill check. (e.g., `!notice`, `!skill notice dexterity`).

**`/roll` | `!roll` <expression> [comment]**
Supports complicated rolls: `1d20+1d4+5`, `2d6-1d4`, `4d6kh3`!
↳ *Specialist:* Use `3d6kh` or `3d6dl` to auto-apply Specialist focus (Keep Highest 2).
↳ *Multiples:* Use `3x 1d20+5` or `3#2d6` to repeat a roll!
↳ *Emojis & Combos:* Use commas to roll multiple things at once! (e.g. `!roll ⚔️ 1d20+5, 💥 1d8+2`)

**`/multiroll` | `!multiroll` <amount> <expression>**
Roll the same expression multiple times with separate detailed lines.
help.tools_body:
**`/ship` | `!ship` | `/shiplist` | `!shiplist`**
View or list your imported starships from Sectors Without Number JSON files.

**`/weapon`, `/armor`, `/gear`, `/foci`**
Browse items from the compendium! Works for SWN, WWN, and CWN.

**`/rule` | `!rule` <keyword>**
Search the core rulebooks for a specific phrase or rule.

**`/combathelp`, `/hack_help`, `/ship_combat`**
Cheat-sheets for combat, hacking, and space combat.
help.sandbox_body:
**`/gen <planet | npc | corp | alien>`**
Instantly generate a beautiful reference card with randomized traits.
NPCs and Aliens come with built-in Attack, AC, and HP stats ready for rolling!
help.tracker_body:
**`/tracker add <name> <hp> <ac> [qty]`** - Add enemies (Bulk supported!).
**`/tracker party`** - Auto-adds all active campaign players.
**`/tracker map`** - Opens the **Interactive Tactical Map** with theme dropdowns!
**`/tracker controller`** - Open the **Native Discord Controller** (Buttons!).
**`/importmap <image>`** - Upload a custom background for the map.
**`/tracker next`** | **`/tracker damage`** | **`/tracker clear`**
↳ *Pro-tip:* Use **`!sync`** if slash commands seem out of date!
help.faction_body:
**`/faction create`, `/faction list`, `/faction edit`**
Manage your campaign's global factions and their stats.
**`/faction attack`** - Roll an opposed faction attack.
help.storyteller_body:
**`/plot`** - Generate a random plot hook or situational idea to spark creativity.
**`/oracle`** - Ask a Yes/No question to the 2d6 Oracle (Solo/GM helper).
**`/reaction`** - Roll a 2d6 NPC reaction (Hostile -> Helpful).
**`/morale <target>`** - Roll a 2d6 morale check against a target score.
**`/loot`** - Find a random flavor item/trinket in an NPC's pocket.
help.party_body:
**`/party info`** - Ship Debt, Credits, and Hull Points.
**`/ship` | `!ship`** - View active starship stats.
**`/party split <amount>`** - Calculate an even payout split!
help.campaign_body:
**`/campaign start`** | **`/campaign join`** | **`/campaign info`**
Link players together for automated combat entry and tracking.
help.voice_body:
**`/voice` | `!voice`**
Opens the **Voice Remote Portal**. Speak your message or dice rolls, and they'll be sent instantly to Discord.

**Voice Integration (Web)**
On the Map and Storyteller, look for the **[Voice Mode]** toggle. It adds visible **[Say: Click ...]** hints to every button, making them easy to trigger with Windows Voice Access.
help.channel_role_body:
**`/channel setup <role> <emoji>`**
Instantly create a join message with a reaction role.

**`!rr [#channel] @role <emoji>`**
Super simple prefix command for one reaction role.

**`!role <emoji> <ID> ... [#channel]`**
**Bulk Setup!** Create one message that grants access to multiple categories or channels by passing their IDs! Example: `!role 🚀 1111 💰 2222 #welcome`

**`/channel role set <role>`**
Designate a role as 'GM' for this channel to control trackers.

errors.no_gm_permission: ❌ You do not have GM permissions in this channel. (Requires Server Admin, Campaign GM, or designated Channel Role)
